hero_desc: Licensed professional and licensed addiction counselor in Boulder helping adults, professionals, and college students overcome addiction, trauma, anxiety, and depression using EMDR, IFS, EFT and Brainspotting.
about_bio: I moved back to Colorado in 2015 after working in the music business in New York and Los Angeles. I'm married with two kids, two dogs, seven chickens and a cat. I have a daily meditation practice and write fiction. I have been sober since 2003.
rate_line: $195 for a 55-minute session (both individual and or couple's sessions are 55 minutes).
cancellation_policy: I require 24-hour notice for missed appointments except in family and weather related emergencies.
insurance_note: I do not accept insurance, but If you have mental health benefits through your health insurance, you may be reimbursed for all or part of the fee. Check with your insurance carrier for mental health coverage. I can provide you with a complete insurance receipt on a monthly basis.
